_comment: Canonical forbidden-token lexicon (CLAUDE.md #1/#2/#5/#8, docs/01 §6, docs/09 §2.3). SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. Consumed at build time by the copy-lint (buildSrc ForbiddenTokens) and mirrored at runtime by app.aspen.domain.safety.DefaultForbiddenLexicon; a parity test on each side fails the build if either drifts from this file. Lists are a reviewed STARTER set (en/de/ur); authoritative per-language lists are advisor/translator-supplied trust-and-safety content (docs/12 §3). eating_advice is runtime-only (AI output guard, Phase 4); the copy-lint uses the first three categories.
